content.en:
The Lord of the Takizawa Realm didn't dare to trouble Ye Tian, after all, his strength was about the same as Ye Tian, and an eighth realm who had comprehended the Supreme Absolute Skill of the Eight Realms and the rules of the Supreme Dimension, it would not be very difficult for him to become the Ninth Realm in the future.

Once a demon like Ye Tian breaks through to the ninth realm, he will not be an opponent.

Therefore, he can only suffer this loss.

Swish!

The Takizawa Realm Lord continued to look for other multi-dimensional ~ supreme object fragments.

......

Time passed slowly, and those fragments of multidimensional supreme things were gradually found and taken away by the ninth realm.

Ye Tian was not greedy either, and left here directly.

In case those top ninth realms slaughtered the weaker ninth and eighth realms for the sake of these multi-dimensional supreme fragments, he wouldn't be able to stop them.

He doesn't care about replicating bodies, but he cares about Terrans!

Once the top Ninth Realm enters the Terrans, he will not be able to protect the Terrans.

So, when it's time to retreat, you have to retreat.

"Six fragments, although they are few, but I am also satisfied!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, he is only in the eighth realm, and it would be very good to be able to obtain six fragments, like the Lord of the Hidden Realm, they should have obtained a lot of fragments.

Subsequently.

He began to study the usefulness of this multidimensional supreme thing.

After continuous research and little bit analysis, he finally understood the usefulness of this multi-dimensional supreme thing.

First of all, it has the effect of increasing cultivation, but this is only a side effect.

The true function of this multi-dimensional supreme object is to integrate into the body, making the body extremely tough, and can resist the tearing force of the multi-dimensional star.

Even if it is consumed, it will increase the strength of the body to a certain extent.

"It's not very valuable in a multidimensional supreme thing, but it's extremely valuable to me!!!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With such a multi-dimensional supreme thing, he can completely enter the Primordial Star and will not be torn apart by the Primordial Star, then he can absorb the energy of the Primordial Star to cultivate the Primordial Star.

You can also enter the primordial star and comprehend the rules of the highest dimension.

But this fragment of the multidimensional supreme object could not allow him to stay inside the primordial star for a long time.

And it is easy to enter the primordial star, but it is difficult to come out, if you can't come out, once the fragments of this multi-dimensional supreme thing are exhausted, then you will definitely die.

Therefore, even if they knew this ability, those Ninth Realms would not dare to use these fragments to break into the Primal Star, it would still be looking for death, but they would just be able to stay in the Primordial Star for a few more years.

However, some multidimensional stars are not too powerful to tear and can escape, so these fragments of the multidimensional supreme can help them survive there and help them gather some resources.

But such a fragment of a multi-dimensional supreme thing is used to collect resources, and it is not worth it.

"It would be nice if we could acquire more fragments of these multidimensional supreme things!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon.

The effect of this multi-dimensional supreme thing came out, and many of the Ninth Realms were very disappointed, after all, this multi-dimensional supreme thing could not greatly improve their strength, and it was the kind of multi-dimensional supreme thing with the lowest value.

As a result, some of the Ninth Realms wanted to sell the fragments of this multi-dimensional supreme thing.

But Ye Tian's cultivation is too low, he is only in the eighth realm, he is looking for someone in the ninth realm, how can people trade with him, maybe the front foot will trade, and the back foot will attack and kill him.

Maybe it will offend a bunch of Ninth Realms at that time, and it will also bring trouble to the human race.

"However, we still have to trade, but we can't trade with our own identity, we have to trade with other Eighth Realm identities. In this way, even if it is exposed afterwards, it can be escaped. "

However, if you want to trade the fragments of the multi-dimensional supreme thing, ordinary treasures are not enough, you must have very precious treasures to be able to impress the ninth realm.

So in the following years, he walked in the sixteenth dimension, the seventeenth dimension, and the eighteenth dimension many times, collecting various resources.

Some resources are also of some use to the Ninth Realm, and if there are enough of them, they can still attract the Ninth Realm.

Of course.

In order to obtain this massive resource, Ye Tian also sacrificed some replica bodies.

this day.

Ye Tian came to trade with a Ninth Realm as a very withdrawn Eighth Realm.

Inside a large hall.

Ye Tian visited this Ninth Realm, this Ninth Realm originally wanted to trade with a Ninth Realm, but the other Ninth Realms were unwilling to ask for his multi-dimensional supreme object fragments, so he downgraded and traded with the Eighth Realm, provided that this Eighth Realm could come up with enough value.

And Ye Tian took out a large amount of resources, which really shocked this Xuanfeng Realm Lord.

He never expected that a mid-eighth realm extradimensional realm would have so many resources, which was simply beyond his expectations.

"Dazzling Wind Realm Lord, can you trade those fragments of multidimensional supreme things?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No problem, I'm willing to trade!" said the Dazzling Wind Realm Lord.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian made a deal with the Lord of the Xuanfeng Realm.

The Dazzling Wind Realm Lord would definitely not kill him here, after all, he came to visit the Dazzling Wind Realm Lord and make a transaction, the outside world knew that if he killed him directly, the reputation of the Dazzling Wind Realm Lord would be ruined.

So.

The Dazzling Wind Realm Lord still honestly completed the deal with him.

Ye Tian obtained seven fragments of the Multidimensional Supreme Thing from the Dazzling Wind Realm Lord, and then left.

Just after leaving the Xuanfeng Realm Lord's place, Ye Tian's other replica body arrived, crossed and shuttled with this replica body, transferred the seven fragments of the multi-dimensional supreme thing, and then used the misty eye soul technique to cover the perception and calculation, and quickly left.

Soon after.

A large hand grabbed Ye Tian's copy body from the depths of the dimensional void, trying to snatch Ye Tian's seven fragments of multidimensional supreme things.

Ye Tian smiled slightly, his body exploded directly, leaving a sentence: "Xuanfeng Realm Lord, I remember you!"

Wow!

The Lord of the Xuanfeng Realm appeared, and when he saw Ye Tian, who had already dissipated, his face was very ugly.

"Suicide directly, that's wrong, could it be that this is a doppelganger?"

Immediately.

He went to investigate Ye Tian's identity, and then personally arrested the other party.

As a result, it was not the other party.

After that, no matter how he deduced, he couldn't deduce who was behind the scenes.

But the Dazzling Wind Realm Lord knows very well that he has inadvertently offended a strong man, which is not a good thing, the key is that he is in the light and the other party is in the dark.

"Damn, if I knew that the other party was so mysterious, I shouldn't have done it!"

The Lord of the Dazzling Wind Realm was remorseful.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian made deals with the six Ninth Realms, three of them attacked him, and three of them did not.

"It's almost enough, go to the Primal Star to cultivate the Primal Star Aperture, and see if you can complete the cultivation of the Primordial Star Aperture!"

Ye Tian decided to go to the west.
